next_step: Feature accepted — ready for next feature

fix_instructions: A2/A4: Remove FakeSupabaseClient fallback from backend/app/core/supabase.py (lines 170-203). Runtime code must not silently fall back to in-memory storage when SUPABASE_URL or SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is missing or supabase library unavailable — it must raise or return an error instead.
A2: Remove in-memory seed (_PROPERTY_SEED / PROPERTIES list) from backend/app/data/properties.py. All property reads/writes must go through the Supabase client with no local fallback.
A2: Remove favorites_store in-memory proxy from backend/app/services/favorites/service.py. All favorites reads/writes must go through the Supabase client.

A4: Fix backend/app/services/health_service.py so that get_health_status() returns status='error' (not 'ok') when Supabase is misconfigured (missing key, client init failure) — not only when a query throws. GET /health must return non-200 for any broken Supabase configuration.

A5: Update backend/tests/test_properties.py, test_admin_properties.py, test_favorites.py so they mock or stub the Supabase client contract (using SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY path), not the old PROPERTIES / favorites_store in-memory variables. Tests must validate the real persistence layer interface.
A7 (deferred to T04 rerun): After T02 fixes are merged, rerun docker compose up --build in a real Docker environment and capture successful health endpoint response.

boundary_issue.description: Modified during T03 but not in T03 declared scope. Evaluate separately: either revert or formally add to T03 scope via tasks.md amendment before T05 rerun.

open_warnings: T02: pytest backend/tests/ not run in real environment — only py_compile static check done in sandbox.
T04: docker compose up --build not end-to-end verified — only docker compose config passed.
T03: middleware file convention deprecated warning (non-blocking).
MINOR: frontend/types/favorites.ts uses camelCase fields; backend schema uses snake_case — type contract mismatch not blocking this retry.

tickets.description: 删除 FakeSupabaseClient fallback（lines 170-203）；Supabase 未配置时必须抛出错误，不得静默回退内存存储
tickets.verification: python3 -c "import sys; sys.exit(0 if 'FakeSupabaseClient' not in open('backend/app/core/supabase.py').read() else 1)"

tickets.description: 删除 _PROPERTY_SEED 和 PROPERTIES in-memory 列表；所有 property 读写必须经过 Supabase client
tickets.verification: python3 -c "import sys; src=open('backend/app/data/properties.py').read(); sys.exit(0 if '_PROPERTY_SEED' not in src and 'PROPERTIES = [' not in src else 1)"

tickets.description: 删除 favorites_store in-memory proxy；所有 favorites 读写必须经过 Supabase client

tickets.description: 修复 get_health_status()：Supabase 未配置时返回 status=error，而非仅在 query 抛异常时；同步更新 health 测试
tickets.verification: python3 -c "import sys; src=open('backend/app/services/health_service.py').read(); sys.exit(0 if 'error' in src else 1)"

tickets.description: 移除对已删除符号的导入（PROPERTIES / favorites_store）和所有直接用法；改为 mock Supabase client contract，与其他已修 A5 测试文件保持一致

tickets.description: 修复 auth_settings fixture 中 env var 名称错误（SUPABASE_KEY → SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY），并为 get_supabase_client 增加明确的 patch，使 search 相关测试不触发真实 Supabase 连接
